highlights.text: I provided this setup way back on Friday June 20th at 4pm, when we were 6020, by stating: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend, until it ends.
My lean is we work back up to 6050, then 6081.
I was looking higher from there, writing last Wednesday at 4pm: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
I wrote on Friday at 4pm: “My lean is, as always, to defer to the trend.
I specified this at the close yesterday: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend until it ends.
In today’s newslette I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into some of the quality Failed Breakdown’s we’ve had this past week (its been a goldmine and good opportunity to learn).
5978-82 to 6081= a range (descending triangle) with 6050 a key magnet inside.

post_title: July 4th Week Bullish As Usual In SPX, But Can Bulls Keep The Momentum Up? July 2nd Plan
